package.name: Bio
package.description: Bioinformatics support (import/export of sequences, conversion, visualization, analysis). [See more](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/blob/master/packages/Bio/README.md) for details.

features.name: Macromolecule Detection & Notation Refinement
features.description: Automatically detects macromolecule semantic types (DNA, RNA, peptides) in columns and refines their notation (HELM, FASTA, BILN, separator) using configurable detectors.

features.name: Sequence Cell Rendering
features.description: Renders macromolecule sequence columns in the Datagrok grid with notation-specific cell renderers (FASTA, HELM, BILN, separator, custom) and per-column tooltips and header panels.

features.name: Sequence Difference Rendering
features.description: Compares two macromolecule sequence columns to build a per-position difference representation and renders it via a dedicated difference cell renderer.

members.name: Compare Sequences
members.description: Builds a MacromoleculeDifference column from two sequence columns (seq1#seq2)

features.name: Notation Conversion
features.description: Converts macromolecule columns between supported sequence notations (FASTA, HELM, BILN, separator, custom) via an interactive conversion dialog.

features.name: Molecule to HELM Conversion
features.description: Converts small-molecule structures (molfiles / SDF) to HELM notation by matching atoms against a monomer library, enabling peptide enumeration workflows.

members.name: Molecules to HELM
members.description: Converts Peptide molecules to HELM notation by matching with monomer library

members.name: Molecule to HELM Single
members.description: Converts a single molecule to HELM notation without requiring a table or column

members.name: molToHelmConverterPy
members.description: Converts molecules to HELM notation based on monomer library

features.name: Atomic Level Structure
features.description: Expands macromolecule sequences (HELM / FASTA / BILN) into full atomic-level molblocks and displays 2D / 3D molecular structures in the property panel.

members.name: To Atomic Level
members.description: Converts sequences to molblocks

members.name: To Atomic Level Single sequence
members.description: Converts a single sequence to molblock

members.name: seq2atomic
members.description: Converts a `Macromolecule` sequence to its atomic level `Molecule` representation

members.name: demoBioAtomicLevel
members.description: Atomic level structure of Macromolecules

features.name: File Import / Export (FASTA, BAM)
features.description: Imports FASTA / nucleotide files and BAM alignment files directly into Datagrok tables and exports sequence columns back to FASTA format.

members.name: importFasta
members.description: Opens FASTA file

members.name: importBam
members.description: Opens Bam file

members.name: saveAsFasta
members.description: As FASTA...

features.name: Monomer Library Management
features.description: Provides a full CRUD UI to manage HELM monomer libraries and collections, including browsing, editing monomers, matching molecules to monomers, and standardising library JSON.

members.name: Manage Monomer Libraries
members.description: Manage HELM monomer libraries

members.name: manageMonomersView
members.description: Edit and create monomers

members.name: getMonomerLibHelper
members.description: Returns an instance of the monomer library helper

members.name: matchWithMonomerLibrary
members.description: Matches molecules in a column with monomers from the selected library(s)

features.name: Split to Monomers
features.description: Splits a macromolecule sequence column into individual per-position monomer columns, enabling position-level analysis of peptide libraries.

features.name: Get Region
features.description: Extracts a named subsequence region (e.g. CDR loop, variable domain) from a macromolecule column into a new column, via an interactive panel, top-menu action, or region input widget.

members.name: Bioinformatics | Get Region
members.description: Creates a new column with sequences of the region between start and end

members.name: getRegion
members.description: Gets a new column with sequences of the region between start and end

members.name: Get Region Top Menu
members.description: Get sequences for a region specified from a Macromolecule

members.name: Sequence Column Input
members.description: Creates a new input for sequence columns with ability to extract a region

features.name: WebLogo & Composition Analysis
features.description: Visualizes the positional monomer composition of a sequence set as a WebLogo plot, with aggregate and per-row composition panels.

members.name: WebLogo
members.description: WebLogo

members.name: Composition Analysis
members.description: Visualizes sequence composition on a WebLogo plot

features.name: Multiple Sequence Alignment
features.description: Aligns a set of macromolecule sequences using built-in engine or PepSeA (MAFFT-based) alignment algorithms, including support for non-canonical peptides and HELM.

members.name: MSA
members.description: Performs multiple sequence alignment

members.name: Multiple Sequence Alignment
members.description: Multiple sequence alignment

members.name: PepSeA
members.description: Aligns non-canonical peptide sequences using PepSeA Docker container (MAFFT)

members.name: Sequence generator
members.description: Create the model peptides/DNA sequences with peptides data

features.name: Sequence Space
features.description: Projects macromolecule sequences into a 2D scatter plot via dimensionality reduction of pairwise distances, enabling visual exploration of chemical diversity.

members.name: Sequence Space
members.description: Creates 2D sequence space with projected sequences by pairwise distance

members.name: demoBioSequenceSpace
members.description: Exploring sequence space of Macromolecules, comparison with hierarchical clustering results

features.name: Sequence Activity Cliffs
features.description: Detects pairs of macromolecule sequences that are structurally similar but have a large difference in a measured biological activity, highlighting SAR discontinuities.

members.name: Sequence Activity Cliffs
members.description: Detects pairs of molecules with similar structure and significant difference in any given property

members.name: demoBioActivityCliffs
members.description: Activity Cliffs analysis on Macromolecules data

features.name: Sequence Similarity & Diversity Search
features.description: Interactive viewers to find the most similar sequences to a query and to pick the most diverse subset from a macromolecule dataset.

members.name: similaritySearch
members.description: Finds similar sequences

members.name: diversitySearch
members.description: Finds the most diverse sequences

members.name: demoBioSimilarityDiversity
members.description: Sequence similarity tracking and evaluation dataset diversity

features.name: Subsequence Search & Substructure Filter
features.description: Searches for a motif or subsequence within macromolecule columns and provides a grid filter widget to interactively narrow rows by substructure match.

members.name: Bio Substructure Filter
members.description: Substructure filter for macromolecules

members.name: Bio Substructure Filter Test
members.description: Substructure filter for Helm package tests

features.name: Sequence Identity & Similarity Scoring
features.description: Computes per-row identity or monomer-fingerprint similarity scores relative to a reference sequence, adding scored result columns to the table.

members.name: Identity
members.description: Adds a column with fraction of matching monomers

members.name: Similarity
members.description: Adds a column with similarity scores, calculated as sum of monomer fingerprint similarities

members.name: seqIdentity
members.description: Gets identity to a reference sequence

features.name: Antibody Numbering & Annotations
features.description: Assigns standard antibody numbering schemes (IMGT, Kabat, Chothia, AHo) to sequence columns and lets users view and manage CDR / framework region annotations.

members.name: Apply Numbering Scheme
members.description: Assigns antibody numbering (IMGT/Kabat/Chothia/AHo)

members.name: Immunum
members.description: Assigns antibody numbering (IMGT/Kabat) using the immunum WASM library

members.name: Manage Annotations
members.description: View and manage sequence annotations on macromolecule columns

features.name: Liability Scanning
features.description: Scans macromolecule sequences for chemical liabilities such as deamidation and oxidation sites that affect biologic drug stability.

members.name: Scan Liabilities
members.description: Scans macromolecule sequences for deamidation, oxidation, and other liabilities

features.name: VD Regions Viewer
features.description: Visualizes V-Domain antibody regions and CDR loops in a dedicated grid viewer, showing aligned region positions across a sequence library.

members.name: VdRegions
members.description: V-Domain regions viewer

features.name: Sequence Encoding for ML
features.description: Encodes macromolecule sequences as numeric feature vectors to feed into dimensionality reduction and other machine-learning pipelines.
